等介词连用;其前也不用冠词.
通常只作及物动词,通常用于 admire for) sth, admire your taste art. 我们都钦佩你的艺术鉴赏力. admired immense physical
although but.如: 正:Although cold, went there. 误:Although cold, went there.
◎他决定放弃这个计划. 误:He decided abandon plan. 正:He decided abandon plan. 析:动词 连用.比较:give plan(放弃计划).
误:The police accused theft [stealing]. 正:The police accused theft [stealing]. accused (doing) 改为for,又如:He accused breaking law.( 控违法).
误:We don't allow smoke here. 正:We don't allow smoking here.
析:almost 情态动词, almost worked 不合原意.
析:have alternative 意为除了做某事外没 有其它的办法,but 后通常接带 不定式.比较:There alternative leave. (没有别的办法,只好离
the, this, that, your 等连用.如: very want see. 你正是我想要见的人. that very moment phone rang. 就在那时电话铃响了.
析:suspect(猜想, 名词+不定式(通常为 suspect that pickpocket. be,若用其 suspect have said suspect
正:The baby asleep. 这婴儿是睡着的. 误:Look asleep baby. 正:Look sleeping baby. 瞧这个睡觉的婴儿. 【注】asleep
maybe 你也许是对的.
for, 连用.如: school convenient [to] station. 我们学校离车站很近便.
open door answer opened door went out. 他打开门就出去了. Will answer door? There's someone knocking. 请你去开门,有人在敲门.
析:content contents
汉语说棉衣是 cotton clothes 吗?否! cotton clothes iscomfortable wear cotton clothes. 穿布衣舒服.
come there(去那儿),go school(去上学).
◆这个村庄很容易到达. 误:The village easy accesses. 正:The village easy access. 词.又如:He easy access(他很容易接近).
◆在这次车祸中有五个人丧生. 误:Five people were killed incident. 正:Five people were killed accident. 析:incident 主要指普通的小事件, 也可指暴力性的政治事件;而 accident
◆他坚持要陪她去车站. 误:He insisted accompanying station. 正:He insisted accompanying station. 析:表示陪某人去某地,只说 accompany place即可,通 accompany sth.
◆他承认偷了钱. 误:He admitted have stolen money. 正:He admitted having stolen money.
◆他们决定采纳我们的建议. 误:They decided adopt suggestion. 正:They decided adopt suggestion.
析:用作介词, after 有区别:after 常与过去时态连用;而 后:He came back after

These synchronous, presettable counters feature internal carry look-ahead application high-speed counting designs. LS161A LS163A 4-bit binary counters. carry output decoded means gate, thus preventing spikes during normal counting mode operation. Synchronous operation provided having flipflops clocked that outputs change coincident with each other when instructed countenable inputs internal gating. This mode operation eliminates output counting spikes which normally associated with asynchronous (ripple clock) counters. buffered clock input triggers four flip-flops rising edge clock input waveform.
■Alternate device (54LS161, 54LS163) available. Contact National Semiconductor Sales
